author: Anusuya Lahiri
headline: Broadcom Thrives with 114% Stock Surge in AI Boom, While Intel Faces Steep Decline
summary: In 2024, the U.S. tech sector had a tumultuous year for semiconductor companies, with Nvidia and Broadcom succeeding in AI while Intel fell behind. Broadcom joined Nvidia and TSMC in the $1 trillion club, while Intel lost value and market share to competitors. Investors favor Broadcom's simpler and cheaper XPUs over Nvidia's GPUs. Broadcom plans to double shipments to top clients, including Google and Meta, and expects AI to make up 65% of its revenue in Q1.
